message.body: Playing  Blerp Sound Emote Meme using 250 Channel Points.
oh, i didn't see the updated leaderboard
when I start practicing abode, I’m just gonna ignore wolsk and Alice exist on the board
so I will use your splits random88Cowboy
the icon splits sound good tho
is only me, or this stage feels a little bit with delay compared to the rest
I can hear again. did I miss anything
I gotta practice the dplane here
I gotta watch his run still
oh kira do you want the split icons I made
I sent them to the humble bundle group but you aren't in that
this is gonna be either the hottest take or the coldest take with no in-between but like
FTJ > Humble > Another Ride > Little Trip > Soul > Change > Hell
for the record saying Hell is the worst humble game is like saying Ringo is the worst Beatle
it had to be one of them and most bands would kill to have Ringo
FTJ > Another Ride > Hell > Humble > Little Trip > Soul = Change
Rattlesnake is probably my favorite single stage in any of the humble games though
crazy to think wolsk is clearing the game just 30 seconds from now
it’s on Randy we’ve all been there
I’d recommend learning how to single jump the gates without stopping
looking at you doing the gates with doublejump makes me nervous
Rattlesnake > Reconstruct > Daytona > Selfies > Wet Hair > Eye Tower > Identity
ranking what I think is the best stage in each game
would have to peep the sheet after this run prob
honestly should I invite kira and/or Eeva to the humbun dm
I don't think either of them would help making
I'll shoot Wolsk a message asking
I definitely don’t have the capabilities to help with making unfortunately lol
I’m definitely down to test anything though
i barely know how to open gamemaker
Playing  Blerp Sound Emote Meme using 250 Channel Points.
I have a crazy ass idea for a skip on 56 but it might just not be worth it
it'd require a 2/3 align possible full jump F jump
2/3 align possible meaning possible on 2 of 3 aligns
did he do the cherry gap tho
top left you can full single jump btw
Humble Abode v2.01 change log: removed all of the needle
ok do you want to humor my dumb idea on 56
wolsk just about to finish a second playthrough
alright finally got the i wanna wiki dm for my game
i'm still not completely confidence on doing that yet, so for now i'm gonna wait for the wiki dm
I got a trivago ad and I’m just realizing that I’ve never seen a single person irl use trivago despite the years of ads
even watching you, my brain tempts me to jump onto the right save
bro honestly if you can’t do an up plane, just don’t even worry about the down plane 😭
i don't know if i want to be serious in this game either
my success rate with them is really low as well
i think i will try to get sub 55, and then MAAAAAAYBE sub 50 and after that lets see what happen
I don’t think I’ll be satisfied with that anymore, knowing what wolsk has done
the spikes clearly have a magnetic pull to them
Playing  Blerp Sound Emote Meme using 250 Channel Points.
do we actually get to choose the type of avoidance? the description just says song
you can choke in this stage so easily
I gotta head out now. good luck with the sub wolsk
this is the stage where the pro runners cut 5 seconds
u gotta bonk every time u go down, its faster than just walking off
this is why i always do 100% runs
i'm a much better endurance runner than i am a sprinter
i did some more looking at F55-58 and came up with what i think is a list of every potential skip https://imgur.com/a/FGFPVFk
feel free to observe and coment on the skippage
instead of doing the intended F jump
find specifically the optimal path through that one stage in soul
i saw those rooms and went "why did you do this"
you also have a duplicate of the stage before it
you did that for the guy tower too
you'd have to do boss 1 again
so like why did you do that if i may ask
you made versions of the stages specifically for when you warp to it from the hub warps
probably because they had weird spawns
if you tell me what still needs a split icon i could start working on that while you're doing bundle stuff btw
so just the other ones for Rest
damn there are no videos on youtube for this game
I should make a video for all the humble series games, mostly trip and soul
does SWMG get a split icon
should we consider it part of fear but have the icon be SWMG
what is that red bar actually?
Playing  Blerp Sound Emote Meme using 250 Channel Points.

full 800x608 20+ frame gifs? load that shit externally
then they can be HQ without killing the gmae
make a "low quality" and "high quality" mode
I'd just need you to get the og gifs

randy: here's a heart felt recollection of where we've been and how we got here to cap off the series up to this point
